meaning: adj.不守誓言的,伪誓的 vbl.forswear的过去分词
examples: The country has not forsworn the use of chemical weapons.
We have never forsworn the use of force.
Some American retailers have forsworn fuel from the tar sands.
Sandro, unlike his elder and much more conservative brother, Roberto, who now runs the Italian company, has forsworn business for art.
Instead of maximising their military power, they have forsworn the use of ground troops, except to uphold a peace agreement that may never come into being.
